description: Publishes a one-off single-track bamboo-pan fork build from the 0.5.0 line. No new migrations.
changelog:
**Fork Distribution:**
- Publish a `single` prerelease build for the bamboo-pan fork package.
- Keep runtime templates and migration entries aligned with the current 0.5.0 fork branch.

**Migration Notes:**
- This build adds no migration actions beyond the existing 0.5.0 chain.
notes: One-off install: `npm install -g @bamboo-pan/trellis@single`. Projects on 0.5 beta or rc can run `trellis update`; single.0 adds no migration entries.
